title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd!
